characters.name: Abura
characters.description: AburaアーブラĀburaAnime nameAburaDebutsAppears inAnime Debut"Ocean"CharacteristicsRaceDemon Realm RaceGenderMaleProfessional StatusOccupationSupreme Demon King(Formerly)AddressDemon Realm(Demon's King Palace)(Formerly)Personal StatusRelativesDabura(son)[1]Towa(daughter)[2]Fu(grandson) Abura(アーブラ,Ābura)is the formerSupreme Demon Kingand father ofDabura. Abura has a more robust physique compared to his sonDabura, giving him a portly appearance. His facial hair is separated compared to his son as well, as he sports a curly mustache and patch instead of a full goatee. Abura wears a navy-blue Lycra-like suit, a white spiked cape, two pairs of necklaces, one being a small silver bead necklace with a round silver plate with design resembling the three layers of the Demon Realm and the other a larger bead necklace with a large silver demonic skull with bright red eyes. He also wears iron bracelets on both of his wrists.

characters.name: Agarizame
characters.description: Directory:Characters→Animal→NekomajinAgarizameアガリザメAgarizameManga nameAgarizameDebutsAppears inNekomajinManga Debut"Neko Majin Mike"CharacteristicsRaceSharkGenderMaleProfessional StatusPersonal Status Agarizame(アガリザメ,Agarizame)is an evilshark-like monster who appears in theNekomajinseries. Agarizame dwells in the water surrounding the island on whichNeko Majin MikeandKojirolive. Thirty-one years before the events ofNekomajin, Neko Majin Mike warned Agarizame not to cause trouble. But while Neko Majin Mike was asleep during the following 31 years, Agarizame eats all thecowsand farming of the island, and all the people who try to chase him away are devoured as well. One day, he appears in a field about to kill a cow, but the cow suddenly turns into Neko Majin Mike. Agarizame lies that he was not about to kill the cow. However, Mike did not believe him due Kojiro having already told Neko Majin what Agarizame did. Agarizame is quickly killed by anEnergy Wavefrom Neko Majin Mike, and Mike later assumes the monster's shape in order to help Kojiro gain confidence in.

characters.name: Agundas (Richard Blake)
characters.description: AgundasアガンデスAgandesuAliasAgundesDebutsDebutDragonball EvolutionCharacteristicsRaceEarthlingGenderMaleProfessional StatusPersonal Status Agundas(アガンデス,Agandesu)is a character in the live-action filmDragonball Evolution. He is a minor antagonist in the film. His name is spelledAgundesinDragonball Evolution: The Game. Agundas is a football player atGoku's high school. He is shown to be the best friend, right-hand man and most loyal and trusted follower of the school bully,Carey Fuller. Agundas and his boss/best friend Carey love bullying Goku although Goku could easily beat both of them and their entire group of bullies. Goku did not want to be violent and so he never fought back.

characters.name: Akira
characters.description: Akiraろぼっとりやま鳥山ロボRobottoriyamaToriyama RoboAnime nameAkiraManga nameToriyamaAliasAkira ToriyamaAkiraToriyamaToriToripoThe authorToriyamaroboRobotoriyamaTori-BotDebutsAppears inDr. SlumpDragon BallDragon Ball ZDragon Ball GTDragon Ball SuperManga Debut"Sea Monkeys"Anime Debut"The Nimbus Cloud of Roshi"Movie DebutDragon Ball Z: Broly - Second ComingGame DebutDragon Ball Z: BudokaiCharacteristicsRaceRobot/DeityBirth DateApril 5, Age 720(1955)Death Date(s)March 1, Age 789(2024)BeforeAge 774[1]Professional StatusOccupationUltimate Ruler of the Dragon WorldCriminal[2]Manga artistAddressToriyama's house,Penguin VillagePersonal StatusStudentsHetappi[3] Akira, theUltimate Ruler of the Dragon World, is a character based on the late authorAkira Toriyamaused to represent himself in appearances in theDragon Ballseries, usually of a comedic nature. He is fashioned in the likeness of Toriyama's avatar "Robotoriyama" and makes several major appearances inDr. Slump, as well as minor appearances inDragon Ball,Dragon Ball Z,Dragon Ball GT, andDragon Ball Super. Toriyama is the ultimate ruler of theDragon Ballworld, and therefore greater thanZeno.
